title: Anwis Eddicus

{{Quote|The goal is to educate young people, all people really, about the heroes and history of the last thousand years. It's a celebration of everything the Republic is and can be.|Biscuit Baron CEO Roridan Temquill, speaking on the "Heroes of the Republic" campaign, in which Eddicus was honored|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Anwis Eddicus''' was a [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="HNN" /> around [[700 BBY]].<ref name="Time">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|business/13328_2.html|Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"}} states that [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] Anwis Eddicus was instrumental in ending the [[Death Seed]] [[plague]]. The plague took place around seven [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] according to ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', which equates to around [[700 BBY]] in the [[Galactic Standard Calendar|calendar system]] present in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> At this [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Death Seed]] [[plague]] struck [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] millions of beings. The outbreak ended when the [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[Droch/Legends|drochs]] responsible for the plague were quarantined on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|176|Death Seed plague}}</ref> with Eddicus playing a role in ending the pandemic.<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|I|226|Eddicus, Anwis}}</ref>

Eddicus was honored on occasion during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the Republic. [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems Engineering's]] [[Eddicus-class planetary shuttle/Legends|''Eddicus''-class planetary shuttle]], developed in the [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], was named for the celebrated Chancellor.<ref name="Databank">{{DB|vehicle|valorumshuttle|shuttle, Chancellor Valorum's}}</ref> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|business/13328_2.html|Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"}} is set on the date 13:3:28, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> [[Biscuit Baron]], a chain of [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurants]] owned by the [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]], launched a [[Standard month/Legends|month]]-long promotion known as "[[Heroes of the Republic (campaign)|Heroes of the Republic]]" to highlight some of the Republic's more notable historical figures; [[Holocube/Legends|holocubes]] depicting these beings were included in bundles of Biscuit Baron's [[QuickSnack]] and [[QuickSnackLite]] [[Foodstuff/Legends|foods]]. Eddicus was among those honored by the campaign, which was promoted in an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]] by the company's [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|CEO]] [[Roridan Temquill]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Anwis Eddicus was first mentioned in "Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #49]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 28]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN49 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6217551|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Dev Sibwarra|date=2002-03-28|time=4:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> Eddicus's story was later expanded on in [[James McFadden]]'s winning entry for ''[[What's The Story?]]''—a feature that allowed [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Star Wars'' Hyperspace]] fan club members to submit backstory entries—for publication in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]].<ref name="Databank" />
